title: Dragon Mint
description: A small mod that adds a new plant to the End and a craftable bucket version of Dragon's Breath.
body:
A small mod that adds a new plant to the End, some food tied to it, and a craftable bucket version of Dragon's Breath.

![A patch of Dragon Mint on a small End island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cba48610c5686a28d04f691aec2f926ee53eb44c_0.webp)

If I hadn't made Enditions specifically to not have any new blocks or items, this wouldn't have been made as a seperate mod. In another world, this would have been an update to Enditions (I would definitely recommend using them together).
Getting into the features:

## New plant:
- Dragon Mint grows in patches in the Small End Islands and End Barrens.
- You can use Bone Meal on Dragon Mint to multiply it (Not always successful).

## New food:
- Dragon Mint Tea made by putting a Dragon Mint Leaf in a Brewing Stand with Water Bottles. Functionally identical to Honey Bottles.
- Dragon Gelatin made with a Dragon's Breath Bucket, Dragon Mint, Sugar, and a Slime Block. Restores a good bit of hunger and grants Health Boost II and Slowness II for 40 seconds.

## New "fluid":
Liquified Dragon's Breath can be placed to spawn a cloud of dragon breath (Though you can't bottle it). The fluid is replaced with air instantly, hence why I say "fluid."

##
(NOTE: I kinda made this mod with the intent to use the Liquified Dragon's Breath alongside Create, but for some reason the fluid doesn't seem to be compatible. Hopefully I can figure that out, eventually)
